title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kaido, Big Mom, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: captain of the big non pirates IN THE OIRAN County: 4.38.000000®

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Captain of the Big Mom Pirates and the city.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From up close, she really sends chills down my spine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So it's her, the world's strongest HAG!?

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: LINLIN! WHAT THE HELL WERE YOU DOING!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm on time, right!? Mamama!! Don't be such a party Popper!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if we stick together, then everything is possible!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You hear that, guys? We're going to get more serious from here out on!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The existence of the ancient weapons will surely cause fear and wars across the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Be prepared, it's the chaotic world we have been waiting for!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wano is safe from both the marines and the world government!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's a natural fortress surrounded by Waterfalls!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we increase the number of weapon factories and put the people of the flower capital to work...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This place will become a "Lawless area", a paradise!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The flower capital is my territory!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who do you think gave you all the weep-

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 39 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
